args.query: global under-five mortality rate 2023 UN IGME

returned: UN IGME 2023: about 37 per 1,000 live births in 2022, down from about 93 in 1990

args.query: leading drivers decline child mortality since 1990 WHO UNICEF

returned: WHO and UNICEF: immunization, treatment of diarrhea and pneumonia, improved maternal and newborn care
